title: Indian-Style Tortilla Wraps
description: A fusion of Indian and Mexican flavors, these wraps are a perfect blend of spices and crunchy vegetables.

ingredients.name: Buttery Naan Bread
ingredients.notes: Available at most Indian grocery stores

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat.
Add cumin, coriander, turmeric, and red chili powder. Cook for 1 minute.
Add ginger and garlic. Cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add Chinese cabbage, onions, and lime juice. Cook until the vegetables are tender.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by spooning the vegetable mixture onto the tortillas and topping with cubed naan bread.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
To make the naan bread more crispy, pan-fry the cubed pieces in a little bit of oil until golden brown.
Serve the wraps with a side of raita or chutney for added flavor.
Enjoy your delicious Indian-Style Tortilla Wraps!
